name: 13.9" x 25.4" Horizontal Landscape Framed Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Digital Art Print, Polystyrene Gold Frame
description:
Liven up your living spaces with the 13.9" x 25.4" Horizontal Landscape Framed Canvas - Threshold designed with Studio McGee. This framed work features a green landscape painting in a oil-on-canvas style, and fits most decor styles neatly. Put this up on an empty patch of wall to lend character to the space.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
